---
title: "Life Expectancy Report"
format: html
execute: 
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
params:
  country: Afghanistan
  start_year: 1970
---

```{r}
if (interactive()) {
  params <- rmarkdown::yaml_front_matter(
    rstudioapi::getSourceEditorContext()$path
  )$params
}
```

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(gapminder)
```

```{r}
life_expectancy <-
  gapminder |>
  select(country, year, lifeExp) |>
  filter(country == params$country) |>
  filter(year >= params$start_year)
```

## Life Expectancy in `r params$country`

```{r}
ggplot(
  data = life_expectancy,
  aes(
    x = year,
    y = lifeExp
  )
) +
  geom_line() +
  theme_minimal()
```
